01

About

I build end-to-end automation systems inside GoHighLevel for service businesses, agencies, real estate & property managers, and coaches.

Most businesses lose opportunities because their follow-up is slow, manual, and inconsistent — good leads go cold while the team is busy. I design clean, conversion-focused systems that engage, nurture, and route every lead automatically: multi-channel follow-up, pipeline and opportunity automation, AI lead qualification, high-converting funnels and websites, A2P/10DLC compliance, and the integrations that tie the whole stack together.

02

What I do

Not one-off tasks — complete systems that run without anyone lifting a finger.

/ 01

Lead Follow-Up Systems

Multi-channel sequences across SMS, email and ringless voicemail that respond in seconds and keep leads warm until they're ready.

/ 02

Funnels & Websites

High-converting funnels, landing pages and full sites built in GoHighLevel, wired straight into your CRM and calendars.

/ 03

AI & Lead Qualification

AI assistants and CloseBot setups that engage, qualify and book leads around the clock, then hand the hot ones to your team.

/ 04

Integrations & Compliance

Zapier / Make / n8n integrations plus A2P 10DLC registration so your messaging is connected, compliant and deliverable.

04

Featured case studies

Screenshots and proof from real automation, CRM, AI, and compliance builds.

N8N · PINECONE · LLM

RAG-based AI agent for document-backed answers

Built a Retrieval-Augmented Generation AI agent using n8n — processes chat messages, retrieves context from Pinecone Vector Store, and generates accurate responses using an LLM. Includes document ingestion from Google Drive, text chunking, embedding generation, and memory handling.

OWNERREZ · ZAPIER · GOHIGHLEVEL

OwnerRez booking integration with CRM

Connected OwnerRez with GoHighLevel via Zapier and external webhooks — triggers lead creation on every new booking, maps guest and booking details into the CRM, and keeps all reservations synced automatically for follow-up and pipeline tracking.

A2P 10DLC · GOHIGHLEVEL · SMS COMPLIANCE

SMS compliance and phone-number verification

Registered and verified A2P 10DLC for a US short-term-rental property manager — brand and campaign approval across multiple local numbers so SMS sends fully compliant and deliverable across all major carriers.

MAKE.COM · OPENAI · GHL SOCIAL PLANNER

AI-powered social media publishing automation

Built a Make.com automation that monitors new content from Google Sheets, enriches it using Perplexity AI, routes through conditional logic, and generates platform-specific posts using OpenAI — publishing automatically to LinkedIn, Instagram, and Facebook. Paired with GHL Social Planner managing 156+ published posts across platforms.

AI-powered social publishing Full GHL workflow PDF Social Planner — 156 posts GHL websites and funnels
